title: Delightful Slaughter
description: Adds interesting drops to mobs in Farmer's Delight style
body:
This mod mostly adds some new drops to Pandas, Sniffers, Phantoms, Horses, Polar Bears and more. Such as Food related items, items that can be used to make some interesting equipment or simply decorations.

May contain some goofy items you might (not) want to eat.

Requires [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
